t: [...] having the knowledge of the Most High and [seeing] the vision [of Shaddai ...]
[...] the man of God an[no]unced us, according [...]
[...] and the assembly of Elyon; they pa[y]ed attention to the voice of Mo[ses ...]
[...] great signs; and in anger he re- strained [...]
[... m]an of the [pi]ous ones and until its ages remember [...]
